title: Interpret Overall System Statistics Main Statistics
summary: Use the Overall System Statistics view to identify the documented main statistics categories and read the available E-stop and volume-related metrics shown in the training source.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing the Overall System Statistics area to identify the main statistics or core system statistics shown by the source, including E-stop and volume-related categories.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to diagnose causes of E-stop activity.
Do not use this runbook to determine corrective actions or recovery actions.
Do not use this runbook to infer meanings beyond the statistics labels and values shown in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Locate the Overall System Statistics view or training material, identify the listed statistics categories, and read the displayed values exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This source supports reading and identifying displayed statistics only.
Do not infer corrective actions or status meanings beyond the statistics labels shown in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Statistics view or training material showing it
Visual access to the displayed statistics categories and values

access_required: Access to the Overall System Statistics view or the referenced training material
system_preconditions: The Overall System Statistics area must be visible

visual_references.description: Training slide or frame showing Overall System Statistics, Main Statistics, E-stop, and volume categories including Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital.

steps.title: Locate the Overall System Statistics main statistics view
steps.purpose: To access the source view where the documented main statistics are shown.
steps.instruction: Open or locate the Overall System Statistics area that shows Main Statistics or core system statistics.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System Statistics area is visible and the Main Statistics heading or core system statistics content can be seen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen or training frame shows Overall System Statistics and Main Statistics or core system statistics.
steps.failure_condition: The Overall System Statistics area or Main Statistics content is not visible.

actions.label: Locate statistics view
actions.exact_action: Open or locate the Overall System Statistics area that shows Main Statistics or core system statistics.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Statistics and Main Statistics headings or core system statistics content.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Overall System Statistics' with 'Main Statistics: Core system statistics.' Transcript says: 'You have your main statistics.'

steps.title: Identify the listed statistics types
steps.purpose: To confirm which statistics categories are documented in this view.
steps.instruction: Identify the listed statistics types in this view, including E-stop and Volume.
steps.expected_result: The visible statistics types are recognized from the source labels.
steps.healthy_condition: E-stop and Volume are visible as statistics types in the Overall System Statistics view.
steps.failure_condition: The listed statistics types cannot be matched to the source-supported labels.

actions.label: Identify statistics types
actions.exact_action: Identify the listed statistics types in this view, including E-stop and Volume.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Types of Statistics entries showing E-stop and Volume.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists 'Types of Statistics' including 'Estop'; transcript mentions 'tippers E stops.'
OCR identifies 'Volume (Total Exchanges, To Tipper, To Hospital)'; transcript mentions 'volume, number of exchanges to tipper to hospital.'

steps.title: Observe the displayed E-stop metric
steps.purpose: To read the E-stop-related metric exactly as presented in the source view.
steps.instruction: For E-stop statistics, observe the displayed E-stop-related metric shown for the system or tippers using only the values presented on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The E-stop-related metric is read directly from the displayed view without added interpretation.
steps.healthy_condition: An E-stop-related metric is visible and can be read directly from the screen.
steps.failure_condition: No E-stop-related metric is visible, or the value cannot be read from the displayed view.

actions.label: Read E-stop metric
actions.exact_action: For E-stop statistics, observe the displayed E-stop-related metric shown for the system or tippers using only the values presented on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: E-stop statistic area referenced by the slide OCR and transcript mention of tippers E stops.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.
Stop if interpretation would require inferring meanings or corrective actions beyond the displayed label or value.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR lists 'Types of Statistics' including 'Estop'; transcript mentions 'tippers E stops.'

steps.title: Identify the volume statistic categories
steps.purpose: To confirm the documented volume categories shown in the source.
steps.instruction: For Volume statistics, identify the documented categories Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital.
steps.expected_result: The three source-supported volume categories are identified in the view.
steps.healthy_condition: Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital are visible as volume-related categories.
steps.failure_condition: One or more of the documented volume categories are not visible.

actions.label: Identify volume categories
actions.exact_action: For Volume statistics, identify the documented categories Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Volume categories showing Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR identifies 'Volume (Total Exchanges, To Tipper, To Hospital)'; transcript mentions 'volume, number of exchanges to tipper to hospital.'

steps.title: Read and record the displayed values
steps.purpose: To capture the visible counts or values exactly as shown by the source-supported categories.
steps.instruction: Read and record the displayed counts or values for the available categories without inferring additional meanings or actions.
steps.expected_result: The visible values are recorded exactly as displayed for the available categories.
steps.healthy_condition: Counts or values are read directly from the screen and recorded without interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: Values cannot be read clearly, or recording would require assumptions beyond what is displayed.

actions.label: Record displayed values
actions.exact_action: Read and record the displayed counts or values for the available categories without inferring additional meanings or actions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Displayed statistics values associated with the visible E-stop and volume categories.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if interpretation would require inferring additional meanings or actions beyond the displayed values.
Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Overall System Statistics' with 'Main Statistics: Core system statistics.' Transcript says: 'You have your main statistics.'
OCR identifies 'Volume (Total Exchanges, To Tipper, To Hospital)'; transcript mentions 'volume, number of exchanges to tipper to hospital.'

success_criteria: The Overall System Statistics view is located.
The main statistics categories supported by the source are identified.
E-stop and Volume statistics are recognized in the view.
The volume categories Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital are identified.
Displayed values are read and recorded exactly as shown without added interpretation.
healthy_conditions: Overall System Statistics and Main Statistics or core system statistics are visible.
E-stop appears as a statistics type in the view.
Volume appears as a statistics type in the view.
Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital are visible as volume categories.
failure_conditions: The Overall System Statistics view cannot be located.
Expected statistics categories are not visible.
E-stop or volume categories cannot be read from the displayed view.
The user must infer meanings or actions not supported by the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the expected statistics categories are not visible in the referenced Overall System Statistics view.
Escalate for SME review if interpretation beyond the displayed labels or values is required.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Statistics main statistics view with E-stop and volume categories.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Slide shows 'Overall System Statistics' with 'Main Statistics: Core system statistics.' Transcript says: 'You have your main statistics.'
OCR lists 'Types of Statistics' including 'Estop'; transcript mentions 'tippers E stops.'
OCR identifies 'Volume (Total Exchanges, To Tipper, To Hospital)'; transcript mentions 'volume, number of exchanges to tipper to hospital.'

missing_details: The source does not provide navigation steps for reaching the Overall System Statistics view from another screen.
The source does not define thresholds, normal ranges, or interpretations for the displayed statistics.
The source does not provide corrective or recovery actions based on E-stop or volume values.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this reference procedure.
